property.name: hive.execution.engine
property.description: Chooses the execution engine. Options: mr, tez, spark. Default is tez.

property.name: hive.support.concurrency
property.description: Required for lock manager support. Enables ACID transactions.

property.name: hive.txn.manager
property.description: Transaction manager that stores transactions/locks in Hive Metastore DB.

property.name: hive.compactor.initiator.on
property.description: Enables compaction initiator thread on Hive Metastore.

property.name: hive.compactor.worker.threads
property.description: Number of worker threads performing compaction jobs in YARN/Tez.

property.name: hive.compactor.cleaner.on
property.description: Enables cleaner thread to purge old delta directories after successful compaction.

property.name: hive.compactor.delta.num.threshold
property.description: Number of delta directories that will trigger a Minor Compaction.

property.name: hive.compactor.delta.pct.threshold
property.description: Ratio of delta files size to base file size that will trigger a Major Compaction.

property.name: hive.exec.dynamic.partition
property.description: Enables dynamic partitions

property.name: hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode
property.description: Allows partitions without specifying a static partition key

property.name: hive.strict.managed.tables
property.description: Ensures managed tables are transactional (ACID) and locks out non-ACID managed table creation.

property.name: hive.create.as.external.legacy
property.description: Default CREATE TABLE statement creates managed ACID tables rather than external tables.

property.name: hive.vectorized.execution.enabled
property.description: Enables vectorized query execution for Map stage

property.name: hive.vectorized.execution.reduce.enabled
property.description: Enables vectorized query execution for Reduce stage

property.name: hive.vectorized.execution.reduce.groupby.enabled
property.description: Enables vectorized GroupBy operator on reducer

property.name: hive.vectorized.use.vectorized.input.format
property.description: Enables vectorized reading of ORC/Parquet

property.name: hive.exec.orc.default.compress
property.description: Compression codec for ORC. Options: NONE, ZLIB, SNAPPY, LZO.

property.name: hive.exec.orc.default.stripe.size
property.description: Size of ORC stripes in bytes.

property.name: hive.exec.orc.default.row.index.stride
property.description: Number of rows in an ORC row index stride (Row Group size).

property.name: hive.exec.orc.writer.index.stride
property.description: Enable indexing at regular row intervals.

property.name: hive.exec.orc.encoding.strategy
property.description: ORC integer/string encoding strategy: SPEED or COMPRESSION.

property.name: parquet.compression
property.description: Compression codec for Parquet format.

property.name: hive.parquet.write.index.enabled
property.description: Write column-index statistics inside Parquet footers.

property.name: hive.metastore.uris
property.description: Thrift URI for Hive Metastore service

property.name: javax.jdo.option.ConnectionURL
property.description: JDBC connection URL for Metastore DB

property.name: javax.jdo.option.ConnectionDriverName
property.description: JDBC driver class for Metastore DB

property.name: javax.jdo.option.ConnectionUserName
property.description: Username to access Metastore DB

property.name: javax.jdo.option.ConnectionPassword
property.description: Password to access Metastore DB

property.name: hive.metastore.schema.verification
property.description: Enforces schema validation.

property.name: hive.server2.enable.doAs
property.description: If true, HiveServer2 executes queries as the connecting user.

property.name: hive.cbo.enable
property.description: Enables Cost-Based Optimizer using Calcite

property.name: hive.stats.autogather
property.description: Enables automatic statistics gathering during writes

property.name: hive.stats.fetch.column.stats
property.description: Allows compiler to fetch column statistics from Metastore for CBO

property.name: hive.stats.fetch.partition.stats
property.description: Allows compiler to fetch partition statistics for CBO

property.name: hive.auto.convert.join
property.description: Enables automatic conversion of common joins into MapJoins

property.name: hive.auto.convert.join.noconditionaltask
property.description: Allows Hive to join multiple small tables in memory without extra shuffle stages

property.name: hive.auto.convert.join.noconditionaltask.size
property.description: Threshold size of small tables to fit into memory for MapJoin

property.name: hive.tez.container.size
property.description: Container size (in MB) for Tez tasks

property.name: hive.tez.java.opts
property.description: Java options for Tez tasks

property.name: hive.tez.input.format
property.description: Input format class for Tez

property.name: hive.tez.dynamic.partition.pruning
property.description: Enables Dynamic Partition Pruning (DPP) in Tez
